data.title: SOL Strategies Ditches Bitcoin Holdings for Solana: Company Now Owns 420,355 SOL
data.description:
(CSE: HODL) announced an additional purchase of Solana (SOL) coins to strengthen its balance sheet. The Canadian company announced on Thursday that it acquired an additional 26,478 SOL coins for $4. 7 million at an average price of about $177
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/sol-strategies-ditches-bitcoin-holdings-for-solana-company-now-owns-420355-sol/

data.title: BlockDAG Banks $10M in 7 Days While Hedera (HBAR) Charts Turn Bearish & Ethereum (ETH) Stalls at $2,550
data.description:
Investors aren’t chasing technical setups anymore, they’re chasing real results. Hedera (HBAR) bearish momentum shows how fast sentiment flips when price hits resistance. Meanwhile, Ethereum (ETH) price pattern stays stuck, with bullish ETF inflows clashing against strong short interest. ETH trades sideways near $2,550, still caught between bulls and bears
source: https://crypto-economy.com/blockdag-banks-10m-in-7-days-while-hedera-hbar-charts-turn-bearish-ethereum-eth-stalls-at-2550/

data.title: Webus International reveals $300M XRP treasury bid to power borderless payments
data.description:
Webus International revealed a plan on May 29 to raise up to $300 million through non-equity financing and deploy the capital into an XRP reserve that will support the company’s global chauffeur services payments network.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/webus-international-reveals-300m-xrp-treasury-bid-to-power-borderless-payments/

data.title: Bitcoin Powers to $112K, But On-Chain Metrics Warn of Potential Pause: CryptoQuant
data.description:
Bitcoin has broken an all-time high at $112,000, bolstering bulls, but on-chain readings from CryptoQuant have pointed to a potential cooling period. The Bull Score Index stands at 80, yet slowing whale inflows and rising unrealized profit margins have flagged consolidation risks near $120K.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-powers-to-112k-but-on-chain-metrics-warn-of-potential-pause-cryptoquant/

data.title: Someone loses over $500,000 in deUSD liquidation, raising concerns about Chainlink’s VWAP pricing system
data.description:
Some onlookers think this decentralized market function could be improved either through stablecoin price caps or "more resilient" algorithms.

data.title: GameStop Buys 4,710 Bitcoin in First Crypto Move
data.description:
Video game company GameStop has confirmed its entrance into the Bitcoin market, purchasing around 4,710 Bitcoins. While it did not disclose details on the acquisition’s cost, the batch purchase is estimated to have cost $513 million. GameStop disclosed the purchase in a recent Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filing
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/gamestop-buys-4710-bitcoin-in-first-crypto-move/

data.title: Tether, Tron, B2B transactions dominate stablecoin markets, but Circle is on the come up
data.description:
New findings from Artemis Analytics showed that Tether’s USDT and Tron blockchain led the charge in global stablecoin transactions, especially in the B2B sector. Circle’s USDC is also gaining momentum and positioning itself for a larger market share. The report published by the blockchain data analytics platform revealed that stablecoins have solidified their position as essential […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tether-tron-b2b-dominate-stablecoin-markets/

data.title: Bloomberg analyst foresees Meta as trailblazer in corporate Bitcoin integration
data.description:
Meta could be the first US corporation of its scale to place Bitcoin (BTC) on its balance sheet, according to Bloomberg senior ETF analyst Eric Balchunas. In a May 28 post on X, Balchunas argued that a move by a “Big Boy” company would validate corporate treasury adoption of the asset.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/bloomberg-analyst-foresees-meta-as-trailblazer-in-corporate-bitcoin-integration/

data.title: US stock markets stay higher post-Nvidia day but trade confusion lingers
data.description:
US stock indexes stayed green on Thursday, lifted slightly by Nvidia’s earnings win, but the market had to fight through fresh uncertainty tied to Donald Trump’s tariff policy and a confusing round of legal whiplash. According to data from CNBC, the S&P 500 rose 0. 3% after hitting a 0. 9% intraday peak before pulling back. The […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-stock-markets-stay-higher/

data.title: BTC makes up 97% of the US’ $20.9B crypto reserve, XRP, SOL, ADA were noticeable absentees
data.description:
The U. S. crypto reserves have been revealed to be 97% made up of Bitcoin, with Ethereum and stablecoins making up the remaining 3%. New data has shown that Bitcoin (BTC) makes up an overwhelming 97% of the United States’ newly centralized $20. 9B cryptocurrency reserve. Ripple (XRP), Solana (SOL), and Cardano (ADA), tokens that President Trump […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/btc-us-crypto-reserve-xrp-sol-ada-absent/
